mapper.sql: id, sale_chance_id, plan_item, plan_date, exe_affect, is_valid, create_date, update_date
mapper.insert:
insert into t_cus_dev_plan
sale_chance_id, plan_item, plan_date, exe_affect, is_valid, create_date,
#{saleChanceId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{planItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{exeAffect,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
insert into t_cus_dev_plan (sale_chance_id, plan_item, plan_date, exe_affect, is_valid) values (#{saleChanceId}, #{planItem}, #{planDate}, #{exeAffect}, #{isValid})

insert into t_cus_dev_plan (sale_chance_id, plan_item, plan_date, exe_affect, is_valid) values
(#{item.saleChanceId}, #{item.planItem}, #{item.planDate}, #{item.exeAffect}, #{item.isValid})
mapper.select: select from t_cus_dev_plan where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_valid = 1

update.foreach: update t_cus_dev_plan set plan_item = #{item.planItem}, exe_affect = #{item.exeAffect} where id = #{item.id}

mapper.delete: update t_cus_dev_plan set is_valid = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_cus_dev_plan set is_valid = 0 where id in
#{item}
